##NAMES=Ferriallanite-(La)
##RRUFFID=R141069
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=CaLa(Fe^3+^AlFe^2+^)[Si_2_O_7_][SiO_4_]O(OH)
##LOCALITY=In den Dellen quarries, Niedermendig, Mendig, Laach lake volcanic complex, Eifel, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Ch. and H. Schäfer
##DESCRIPTION=Black tabular crystals embedded in matrix, associated with sanidine, magnetite and cancrinite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R141069
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.906 b: 5.755 c: 10.116 alpha: 90 beta: 114.64 gamma: 90 volume: 471.3 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
